name: Zomato MCP Server — Food Delivery & Restaurant Data
what_it_does: Official Zomato MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Zomato's food delivery and restaurant platform — searching restaurants, browsing menus, checking delivery availability, tracking orders, and integrating Zomato's food discovery and delivery capabilities into agent-driven personal assistant and food ordering workflows.
use_cases: Searching restaurants and menus from personal assistant agents
Checking food delivery options and estimated times from planning agents
Discovering new restaurants based on cuisine from recommendation agents
Tracking active food delivery orders from personal assistant agents
Building meal planning agents that suggest restaurants
Integrating food ordering into productivity workflows from assistant agents
not_for: Non-Zomato service areas (primarily India, some international)
Restaurant owners managing listings (consumer-facing, not business API)
Automated bulk ordering without human confirmation
best_when: An agent-powered personal assistant needs to search Zomato for restaurant options, browse menus, or track orders in Zomato-served areas.
avoid_when: You're outside Zomato's delivery areas — use local food delivery platform MCPs.

auth.notes: Zomato OAuth required for user-specific features (order tracking). Public search may work with API key. Official Zomato MCP — check Zomato developer portal for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Zomato API: free tier for public data access
pricing.paid_tiers: Zomato API: enterprise pricing for production use
pricing.notes: Official Zomato MCP. Zomato API access may require developer account approval.

known_agent_gotchas: Zomato developer API access requires approval — not self-service
Restaurant availability varies significantly by location/PIN code
Menu prices and items change frequently — treat as point-in-time data
Order placement requires confirmed human intent — don't automate orders
Official Zomato MCP — quality higher than community food delivery MCPs
Primarily India-focused — international Zomato coverage is limited
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth for user data. Official Zomato MCP. Location data used for restaurant search — handle per privacy policy. Never automate order placement without confirmation.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth. Official Zomato. Location privacy. No automated ordering.
